scripts.preinstall: node -e "try { const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch(e) {} }); } catch(e) { console.log('Cleanup skipped'); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd artifacts/api-server && pnpm run dev" "cd artifacts/portfolio && pnpm run dev"
